channel.title: Cunxin Huang on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Cunxin Huang on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Wednesday, 1 March 2023
item.description: Title: High-dimensional probability theory. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk is the third one of the serie introducing R. Vershynin. High-Dimensional Probability: An Introduction with Applications in Data Science. Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2018.

item.title: Wednesday, 15 February 2023
item.description: Title: High-dimensional probability theory. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk is the third one of the serie introducing R. Vershynin. High-Dimensional Probability: An Introduction with Applications in Data Science. Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2018.

item.title: Wednesday, 1 February 2023
item.description: Title: High-dimensional probability theory. Venue: Online. Notes This talk is the second one of the serie introducing R. Vershynin. High-Dimensional Probability: An Introduction with Applications in Data Science. Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2018.

item.title: Tuesday, 10 January 2023
item.description: Title: The missing semester course. Venue: Online. Notes This talk introduced the missing semester course taught at MIT. The authors focused on shell tools and scripting, the vim editor, and version control using git.

item.title: Monday, 3 October 2022
item.description: Title: High-dimensional probability theory. Venue: Online. Notes This talk is the first one of the serie introducing R. Vershynin. High-Dimensional Probability: An Introduction with Applications in Data Science. Cambridge, UK: Cambridge University Press, 2018.
